user_text: AK-BENCH-001: Customer asks enterprise annual plan refund SLA. Phone 13800138000 should be masked.
assistant_text: AK-BENCH-001: Enterprise annual plan refunds are handled by Finance Ops within 14 calendar days; legal-risk cases escalate to finance-ops-escalation.

user_text: AK-BENCH-002: Customer asks when cross-region installation delivery should be escalated.
assistant_text: AK-BENCH-002: Cross-region delivery delayed over 72 hours should be escalated to Logistics Control Tower with order evidence.

user_text: AK-BENCH-003: Operations asks whether a coupon can be stacked with a renewal discount.
assistant_text: AK-BENCH-003: Renewal discounts cannot stack with seasonal coupons; keep the larger discount and record campaign code renewal-guard.

user_text: AK-BENCH-004: Customer cannot access the company workspace after domain migration.
assistant_text: AK-BENCH-004: Workspace domain migration issues go to Identity Support; verify SSO domain ownership before resetting accounts.
